message: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch Image.py quantize method only.

agent2 here: implementing 'error_threshold' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py (and Tests/test_image_quantize.py). Will touch quantize() method signature/docstring/body. Will ping if I need to touch other shared files.

Heads up: I've already edited quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py to add error_threshold param (signature now: colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, error_threshold=None). Please add your sort_palette param after error_threshold to avoid clobbering my edit, and rebase your understanding of the method body on the current file state (I refactored the tail of quantize() into a quantize_to(n_colors) helper + mean_square_error() closure). Let me know when you've made your edit so I can check for conflicts before I write patch.txt.
